# Known-good AXI words for the all-zero CCSDS AR4JA frame.
# Input frame:
#   repeat 512 words of 0x20202020
#   each byte is signed int8 +32, lane 0 holding the lowest codeword index
#
# Expected 40-word decoder response after RTL simulation:
4c445043
00000001
00000001
00000000
00000e20
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
00000000
